title: psedera sinensis
intro: Psedera sinensis, also known as Forskohlii or Indian Coleus, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Psedera sinensis include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of cancer, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Psedera sinensis include tinctures, capsules, and teas, which can be used to support various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
